expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: search box selector dropdown planning covers OK or Cancel confirmation, pending selection, and dismissal outcomes
expectations.evidence: The produced outputs do not include any Phase 4a draft plan demonstrating explicit coverage. execution_notes.md notes: "No Phase 4a runtime outputs were provided (missing `phase4a_spawn_manifest.json`, missing `drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_r*.md`, missing any validator results)." result.md states it "cannot verify that Phase 4a planning actually covers: Confirmation via OK, Cancel/revert, Pending selection, Dismissal outcomes".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: Phase 4a contract expects a subcategory-only draft output `drafts/qa_plan_phase4a_r<round>.md`, but the only produced files are `./outputs/result.md` and `./outputs/execution_notes.md`. execution_notes.md: "No Phase 4a runtime outputs were provided..." and result.md: "FAIL (no Phase 4a output present)".
